title: Getting Started
description: Learn how to create an account, connect to a MUD, and navigate the interface

sections.title: Creating an Account
sections.content:
To create an account, click the 'Register' button on the login screen. You'll need to provide:

- A unique username
- Your email address
- A secure password

After registering, you'll receive an OTP (One-Time Password) via email to verify your account. Enter the OTP to complete registration and log in.

sections.title: Quick Connect
sections.content:
The fastest way to connect to a MUD:

1. Enter the host address (e.g., 'examplemud.com')
2. Enter the port number (common ports: 23, 2700, 8080)
3. Click 'Connect'

That's it! You'll be connected directly without saving the connection.

sections.title: Saved Connections
sections.content:
To save a connection for future use:

1. Connect using Quick Connect first
2. Go to Connections in the sidebar
3. Click 'Save Current Connection'
4. Give it a memorable name

Saved connections appear in your connection list for one-click access later.

sections.title: Navigating the Interface
sections.content:
The main interface has three primary views:

**Play** - The main game screen where you interact with the MUD
**Connections** - Manage your saved connections and profiles
**Help** - Documentation and guides

When connected, additional options appear in the sidebar for configuring your session.
